# Log level filtering

## Intent

Drop log records below the configured level.

## Non-goals

- Not formatting.

## Requirements

### AC-001 — drops below threshold

When a record is below the threshold, the logger must drop it.

Verify with: `npm test -- logger`

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/log/level.ts`
